I've never even gone to a group type setting. I actually don't even really feel super comfortable going to the regular, like I'll go to the gym and kind of stick to the cardio and that's it. I'm not gonna leave. So you just go to the gym, do one machine, and leave it. Yeah, or two guys, like treadmill and like stair master like that. You're in the right place. Yeah. We used to be a quick fix program like many of the other challenges, the damaging admission. We put so much energy into all these awesome workouts, Javier, they were awesome, and they still are. But it turns out that people who are doing all these workouts, and a lot of them were plateauing, what we think in progress. So we realized that the ones that were always consistently making progress, hitting goal after goal, to the guys that are not ideal for everybody, were the ones with the one-on-one coach. And so we love the groups, we still do them, but now our mission is for everyone to have a one-on-one coach.
